title: descurainia californica
intro: Descurainia californica, also known as Western wallflower or California wallflower, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States and Canada. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Descurainia californica include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
